context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Dev System is fully functional. The system generates full-stack modules (React frontend + FastAPI backend + MongoDB schema) using GPT-4o via Emergent LLM Key. Module generation takes 30-60 seconds due to LLM API calls. Pre-existing modules: NotificationSettings (tested), TEST_SKIP (generated). The AIDevStudio.js component is integrated into SuperAdminDashboard.js under the 'ai-dev' tab with data-testid='ai-dev-tab'.
